title: portulaca ragonesei
intro: Portulaca ragonesei, also known as the Ragonese's purslane, is a flowering plant species within the Portulacaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Portulaca ragonesei include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as teas, infusions, or capsules, and it is also sometimes used in topical applications to aid in skin health.
